metadata.description: Generate and convert HTML slide presentations with interactive components or creative visual themes.

plugins.name: html-slides
plugins.description: Generate single-file HTML slide presentations with interactive components (flip cards, charts, tables, code blocks, stats, architecture flows, and more) or creative visual themes.

plugins.name: html-slides-convert
plugins.description: Convert any HTML file (reveal.js, Marp, Google Slides exports, articles, generic HTML) into a valid HTMLSlides presentation.
